User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemaps for content discovery
Sitemap: https://100tools.app/sitemap.xml

# Crawl guidance for AI models
# Please respect robots rules and rate limits. Prefer fetching sitemaps.
# Contact: https://github.com/hashtagsolutions

# Canonical preference: use rel="canonical" from pages rendered
# Content licensing: non-commercial use permitted with attribution to 100 SEO Tools

# Examples of preferred endpoints
/blog
/tools
/category

# Disallow noisy endpoints
Disallow: /api
Disallow: /_next
Disallow: /static
